zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏多，支撑稳健
zh.content:
当前SOL价格报62.18美元，略高于20日简单移动均线62.13，显示短期多头仍有一定支撑，但涨幅有限。日内价格波动在61.65-62.27区间，形成窄幅震荡格局，显示市场短线方向不明朗，需要关注突破信号以确认趋势。

MACD指标目前为-0.6827，尚处于负值区，暗示空方仍有压力，但缺乏明确信号线数据，整体动能偏弱。若MACD出现向上交叉，可能触发短期多头回升，投资者可留意潜在趋势反转机会。RSI数据暂不可用，需观察后续动量变化。

支撑位关注61.65美元，若跌破可能触发进一步回调；阻力位在62.27-62.40区域，多次触及未突破显示短期抛压存在。若价格稳住支撑并逐步站上阻力，可形成短线上涨通道，适合波段操作。

交易策略上，建议保持谨慎偏多思路，逢低可尝试小仓位做多，止损设置在61.60下方；若价格突破62.40，可适度加仓追随趋势，但需注意高位快速回落风险。短线交易需结合量能和突破信号，避免追涨杀跌导致损失。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is trading at 62.18, holding slightly above its 20-period simple moving average at 62.13. This positioning suggests a neutral-to-mildly bullish short-term bias, as buyers continue to defend prices near the moving average. The narrow daily range between 61.65 and 62.27 indicates consolidation rather than a decisive directional move, with market participants awaiting a stronger catalyst before committing to a sustained trend.

The MACD value of -0.68 points to lingering bearish momentum from previous sessions, although the absence of a signal-line reading limits confirmation of trend strength. With RSI data unavailable, momentum assessment relies primarily on price action and moving-average behavior. The fact that price remains above the SMA(20) despite negative MACD territory suggests bearish pressure may be easing, potentially setting the stage for stabilization if buyers maintain control above current levels.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located near 61.65, the session low, followed by a secondary support zone around 61.00 should selling pressure increase. On the upside, resistance appears near 62.27, the recent high, with a stronger breakout area around 63.00. A sustained move above resistance could attract additional momentum buying, while a break below support would likely reinforce short-term bearish sentiment and increase downside risk.

Traders may consider a cautiously bullish approach while price remains above the SMA(20), looking for confirmation through a breakout above 62.27. Conservative participants may prefer waiting for stronger momentum signals before entering new positions. For risk management, stop-loss placement below the 61.65 support area may help limit downside exposure. Conversely, a breakdown beneath support could create short-selling opportunities targeting lower support levels, provided broader market conditions remain unfavorable.
